title: Add syllabus chapter tracker to organize study sessions by subject

requirements.summary: Create a frontend component for managing syllabus chapters that displays a list of all chapters with their subjects and allows users to add new chapters with title and subject fields
acceptanceCriteria: Component displays all user chapters in a card-based layout consistent with existing UI design
Add chapter form includes title and subject input fields with validation
Users can create new chapters and see them appear in the list immediately
Component uses warm earthy color palette matching existing theme

file_operations.description: Create a card-based chapter management component that displays all user chapters with title and subject, includes an add chapter form with validation for title and subject fields, and uses the warm earthy color palette with gradient backgrounds matching existing card patterns

Add useChapters query hook to fetch chapters from backend using getChapters method, add useCreateChapter mutation hook that calls createChapter backend method and invalidates the chapters query on success
Import and add ChapterManager component to the authenticated view after TimerSettings and before DailyQuote to integrate chapter management into the main application flow

requirements.summary: Add chapter selection functionality to the Pomodoro timer so users can optionally associate their current study session with a specific chapter before starting the timer
acceptanceCriteria: Timer component includes a chapter selector dropdown or similar UI element
Users can choose a chapter or leave it unassociated
Selected chapter is passed to backend when starting a study session
Chapter selection is cleared after session completion

file_operations.description: Add selectedChapterId state to track the currently selected chapter, pass chapterId parameter to startSession backend method when starting a timer, clear selectedChapterId after session completion, and expose setSelectedChapterId function for UI control

Add chapter selector dropdown UI element above the timer controls using useChapters hook to fetch available chapters, display chapter title and subject in options, allow users to select a chapter or choose none, and bind selection to usePomodoro selectedChapterId state

requirements.summary: Enhance the session history view to display the associated chapter name for each study session, with the ability to filter sessions by chapter
acceptanceCriteria: Each session item shows the chapter title and subject if associated
Users can filter the session history list by selecting a specific chapter
Filter UI matches existing design patterns and color scheme
Unassociated sessions are clearly indicated

file_operations.description: Add chapter display to session item showing chapter title and subject when chapterId is present, fetch chapter details using the chapters list from context or props, display unassociated sessions with a clear indicator like 'No chapter' or 'Unassociated'

Add chapter filter dropdown above the session list using useChapters hook to populate filter options, implement client-side filtering to show only sessions matching the selected chapter or all sessions when no filter is active, use existing card and select styling patterns
Ensure useSessions query returns session data including chapterId field for each session to support chapter display and filtering in the history view

requirements.summary: Add chapter-level statistics to the statistics dashboard showing total study time and session count per chapter with visual breakdown
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard includes a new section for chapter statistics
Shows study time distribution across chapters using charts
Displays session count per chapter
Integrates with existing Recharts visualization patterns

file_operations.description: Add a new chapter statistics section below existing metrics that calculates total study time and session count per chapter from sessions data grouped by chapterId, display results in a card matching existing design patterns with warm colors

Add a new chart tab for chapter distribution showing a bar chart of study time per chapter and a pie or bar chart for session count per chapter using Recharts components consistent with existing chart styling and color palette

requirements.summary: Implement edit and delete functionality for syllabus chapters with confirmation for deletion to prevent accidental data loss
acceptanceCriteria: Users can edit chapter title, subject, and notes after creation
Delete action shows confirmation dialog
Deleting a chapter does not delete associated sessions but marks them as unassociated
Backend enforces ownership validation for edit and delete operations

file_operations.description: Add useEditChapter mutation hook that calls editChapter backend method with chapterId, newTitle, newSubject, and newNotes parameters, add useDeleteChapter mutation hook that calls deleteChapter backend method, invalidate chapters and sessions queries after successful mutations

Add edit button to each chapter card that opens an inline or modal edit form with fields for title, subject, and notes, add delete button that shows a confirmation dialog before calling useDeleteChapter mutation, display success/error toast notifications using existing patterns
